zh.lifeSummary: 當Susanna Curti於1538年出生在英國戴文普林普頓時，她的父親William Curtis40歲，母親Sarah Clarke38歲。她於1583年與Richard Poynter Esq.在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1604年4月11日在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 迪奧尼斯 巴其享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Curti
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Amerigo, Angelo, Cesare, Ciro, Dario, Evo, Fernando, Josafat, Mario, Olivio, Ruben.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Curto  .

variants.name: Curto
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Sal, Fausto, Giovanni, Carmelo, Carmine, Concetta, Dino, Gioacchino, Marcello, Michelangelo.

Italian (southern), Spanish, and Portuguese: nickname for a short man, from southern Italian curtu, curto, Spanish and Portuguese curto ‘short’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short; broken off’).
Catalan (Curtó): from a diminutive of Curt .

nameMeanings.name: Susanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzannah
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Susanna Curti was born in 1538, in Plympton, Devon, England, her father, William Curtis, was 40 and her mother, Sarah Clarke, was 38. She married Richard Poynter Esq. in 1583, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 11 April 1604, in St Dionis Backchurch, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susanna Curti est née en 1538, à Plympton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Curtis, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Sarah Clarke, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Poynter Esq. en 1583, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 11 avril 1604, à St Dionis Backchurch, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Susanna Curti(이)가 1538년 영국 데폰 플림프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Curtis(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Clarke(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1583년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard Poynter Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1604년 4월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 디오니스 바ckc후르치에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Richard Poynter Esq. em 1583, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susanna Curti родилась в 1538 г. в местности плимптон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени William Curtis было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Clarke, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Poynter Esq. в 1583 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 11 апреля 1604 г. в местности ст дионис баккчурч, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания.
